reasoning: The market implies a very low probability (approx 1.2%) that DeepSeek will hold the #1 spot on LMP Sys Chatbot Arena specifically on December 31, 2025. While DeepSeek released V3 in late December 2024 and R1 in Jan 2025 with highly competitive metrics, it competes against Western giants like OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and xAI that have access to vastly more compute. Given OpenAI is expected to release models like GPT-4.5/GPT-5/o3 and Anthropic may release Claude 4 by late 2025, DeepSeek's chance to be strictly the top is very slim, matching the market rate. I am rounding up to 0.02 due to the tool constraint limits.
